name: Total Phosphorus Concentrations in Lake Constance (1967-1971)
description: Annual measurements of Total Phosphorus (TP) concentrations in the upper 20 meters of the water column at Lake Constance, specifically at the Fischbach-Uttwil station. Data includes observation years, depth intervals, water depth, geographic coordinates, and elevation, with values representing averages for the summer months (July, August, September).
